title: Acceglio

infobox.value: ([Vivaro-Alpine](/wiki/Vivaro-Alpine_dialect "Vivaro-Alpine dialect"): *Acelh*) is a *[comune](/wiki/Comune "Comune")* (municipality) in the [Province of Cuneo](/wiki/Province_of_Cuneo "Province of Cuneo") in the [Italian](/wiki/Italy "Italy") region [Piedmont](/wiki/Piedmont "Piedmont"). It is located above [Prazzo](/wiki/Prazzo "Prazzo") in the upper [Valle Maira](/wiki/Valle_Maira "Valle Maira") about 90 kilometres (56 mi) southwest of [Turin](/wiki/Turin "Turin") and about 45 kilometres (28 mi) west of [Cuneo](/wiki/Cuneo "Cuneo"), on the border with France.
["Superficie di Comuni Province e Regioni italiane al 9 ottobre 2011"](https://www.istat.it/it/archivio/156224). Italian National Institute of Statistics. Retrieved 16 March 2019.
All demographics and other statistics: Italian statistical institute [Istat](/wiki/National_Institute_of_Statistics_(Italy) "National Institute of Statistics (Italy)").

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/43/Alta_Val_Maira.jpg/250px-Alta_Val_Maira.jpg)](/wiki/File:Alta_Val_Maira.jpg)

The high Val Maira, near Chiappera.

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/b0/Chiappera1.jpg/250px-Chiappera1.jpg)](/wiki/File:Chiappera1.jpg)

Chiappera, a hamlet within the commune.

**Acceglio** ([Vivaro-Alpine](/wiki/Vivaro-Alpine_dialect "Vivaro-Alpine dialect"): *Acelh*) is a *[comune](/wiki/Comune "Comune")* (municipality) in the [Province of Cuneo](/wiki/Province_of_Cuneo "Province of Cuneo") in the [Italian](/wiki/Italy "Italy") region [Piedmont](/wiki/Piedmont "Piedmont"). It is located above [Prazzo](/wiki/Prazzo "Prazzo") in the upper [Valle Maira](/wiki/Valle_Maira "Valle Maira") about 90 kilometres (56 mi) southwest of [Turin](/wiki/Turin "Turin") and about 45 kilometres (28 mi) west of [Cuneo](/wiki/Cuneo "Cuneo"), on the border with France.

Acceglio borders the following municipalities: [Argentera](/wiki/Argentera "Argentera"), [Bellino](/wiki/Bellino "Bellino"), [Canosio](/wiki/Canosio "Canosio"), [Larche](/wiki/Larche,_Alpes-de-Haute-Provence "Larche, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence") (France), [Meyronnes](/wiki/Meyronnes "Meyronnes") (France), [Prazzo](/wiki/Prazzo "Prazzo"), and [Saint-Paul-sur-Ubaye](/wiki/Saint-Paul-sur-Ubaye "Saint-Paul-sur-Ubaye") (France).

## Tourism

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Acceglio&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Tourism")]

The territory of Acceglio, thanks to its intact natural environment, is a destination for hiking, mountain biking and mountaineering. To support those activities, Acceglio has several alpine huts:

* [Rifugio Campo Base](/wiki/Rifugio_Campo_Base "Rifugio Campo Base")
* [Rifugio Stroppia](/w/index.php?title=Rifugio_Stroppia&action=edit&redlink=1 "Rifugio Stroppia (page does not exist)")
* [Bivacco Barenghi](/w/index.php?title=Bivacco_Barenghi&action=edit&redlink=1 "Bivacco Barenghi (page does not exist)")
* [Bivacco Enrico e Mario](/w/index.php?title=Bivacco_Enrico_e_Mario&action=edit&redlink=1 "Bivacco Enrico e Mario (page does not exist)")

## Frazioni

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Acceglio&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Frazioni")]

Acceglio has 11 *[frazioni](/wiki/Frazioni "Frazioni")* whose elevation [above sea level](/wiki/Above_mean_sea_level "Above mean sea level") varies between approximately 1,200 and 1,650 metres (3,940 and 5,410 ft):[[3]](#cite_note-frazioni-3)

* Villar (1375 m)
* Ponte Maira (1404 m)
* Saretto (1533 m)
* Chiappera (1614 m) (pictured)
* Bargia (1401 m)
* Lausetto (1510 m)
* Colombata (1576 m)
* Frere (1196 m)
* Gheit (1372 m)
* Chialvetta (1494 m)
* Pratorotondo (1639 m)
